cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Once again, you install the DLC but don't click on the "Play" button in the Steam Client for STCC2; instead you start RACE07 (the base game) and it will run and you can see the installed DLC (also visible in the lower left corner inside the game menu screen). Runs great. Works with XInput and DirectInput wheels (also, XBONE/PS gamepads). Does not deserve 'borked' tag, bc of clicking on the wrong 'Play' button.
title: STCC The Game 2 – Expansion Pack for RACE 07
